name: forge-and-field

hypothesis.comparable: Indie strategy games on Steam in the $10-20 range with niche audiences (e.g., Loop Hero, Slipways, Bad North) routinely sustain $500-5000/mo for years post-launch when wishlist > 5k pre-launch. Realistic floor for a polished indie strategy title with proper Steam page + demo.
hypothesis.notes: Strongest signal in the games portfolio per ship-and-finish memory. Deserves individual scrutiny vs. game-a-palooza bucket.

next_revenue_action: Push current build to deploy and create Steam coming-soon page with capsule + 5 screenshots by 2026-04-22
first_dollar_path: Steam page live → demo build → Next Fest entry → wishlist push → launch
kill_criteria: If <500 wishlists 30 days after Steam page goes live, reassess scope/positioning. If <1000 by 2026-08-01, consider sunset or pivot to web/itch.io free release.
